## Frequently asked questions (FAQs)

Employee training and development needs in performance appraisal is either about providing specific skills and knowledge to an employee, improving their skills and knowledge of management, organization, administration, and organization development or both.

Training evaluation metrics are crucial to measuring training effectiveness evaluation. Mercer | Mettl provides many training effectiveness measurement tools that help understand the training lifecycle, including identifying training needs, measuring the program ROI, and impacting employees' knowledge and skills.
